Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers, Without Objections, To Form Interrogatories, Set One: Req. For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Deft John K Takata Corporation Dba Restoration Management And Its Attorney D. Dean Lindberg In The Sum Of $1790.00
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF PAUL WETZEL'S MOTION To Compel Answers, Without Objections, To Form Interrogatories, Set One: Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant John K Takata Corporation Dba Restoration Management Company And Its Attorney D. Dean Lindberg In The Sum Of $1790.00 is Granted. Defendant must provide responses within 14 days from notice of entry of the order. Defendant has failed to provide the responses referred to in its response to the motion as ordered on 12/20/10. Sanctions awarded to Plaintiff in the amount of $500.00. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
